/usr/lib/ccache/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libdumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/dumme_msgs/srv/detail/euler_to_quaternion__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/dumme_msgs/srv/detail/quaternion_to_euler__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/asambhav/Storage/dumme_sim/build/dumme_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libdumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
